name: stack

interface.shortDescription: Audit configured cloud and SaaS providers
interface.longDescription: Record the active stack, verify connector access, and run only applicable provider audits. Migrated workflows: $stack-audit-cloudflare, $stack-audit-payments, $stack-audit-supabase, $stack-audit-tags, $stack-audit-vercel, $stack-connector-check, $stack-intake. This Codex-native edition packages explicit workflows as skills, records sensitive actions as explicit-only, and uses portable installed-skill paths.
